title: Old Ores 64x Edition
description: A simple but effective texure pack that makes all of the textures in Faithful 64x match the diamond texture, which gives it a pre-1.17 look.
body:
![Old Ores Java Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b31d412b0817b5fbad0e8f1518c905d0f4fa7922.png)
### Makes all the ores in Faithful 64x copy the diamond ore, which gives it a pre-1.17 look.
### **This pack Include all the ores in minecraft.** #### **Diamonds, Gold, Iron, Coal, Emeralds, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, and even their deepslate varients!**
**To install, make sure this pack is on top your existing installment of Faithful 64x by the Faithful team.**
Disclaimer I am not affiliated with Faithful 64x, and I do not claim to own anything from their work. I simply copied over the color of different ores onto the normal diamond ore made by the Faithful team. If there is any issue I will be more than welcome to do any action requested if necessary.
